---
title: "Data Exploration"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

dta <- read.csv(file = "~/ERM/data_clean/logs_with_devices.csv")
```

```{r}
dta |> head() |> View()
```

```{r}
usage <- dta |> 
  filter(!is.na(point_id)) |> 
  mutate(
    timestamp = dmy_hms(time_raw),
    date = as_date(timestamp),
    hour = hour(timestamp),
    weekday = wday(timestamp, label = TRUE, week_start = 1),
    month = month(timestamp),
    visitor_id = card_hex
  )

```


# TODO: 

- [] go through the research questions and plan how to answer them 
- [] how to map the data points onto the floor plan
    - device_id 
    - a dynamic floorplan
- [] connect metadata to logs 
- [] parquet file + pipeline automation + cleanup 
- [X] network data - model the individual 
- [] network data - compute all paths for all visitors 

```{r}
usage |> tail()
```
